ammo.description: returns amount of ammo held for currently selected weapon

bestammo.description: returns ammo held for the 'best' weapon

bestweapon.description: returns name of best weapon in inventory

cam_angles.description: returns current camera angles, in format that can be passed to /cam_angles command.

cam_pos.description: returns current camera position, in format that can be passed to /cam_pos command.

cam_pos_x.description: returns one component of current camera position.

cam_pos_y.description: returns one component of current camera position.

cam_pos_z.description: returns one component of current camera position.

cells.description: returns number of cells held, regardless of weapon selected

colored_armor.description: returns $armor, surrounded by color codes so it is displayed in &c0b0red&r, &cff0yellow&r, &e00green&r or &cfffwhite&r

colored_powerups.description: current powerups held as color-coded full names (quad, pent, ring), concatenated without separator.

colored_short_powerups.description: current powerups held as compact color-coded initials (q=quad blue, r=ring yellow, p=pent red); output order is q-r-p. Returns empty string when no powerups held.

connectiontype.description: returns the current type of the connection

enum.description: client is disconnected from the server
client is connected as a spectator
client is connected as a player

date.description: returns the current date in the format <day>.<month>.<year>

dateiso.description: current local date and time in ISO-adjacent format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM.

demolength.description: returns the expected length of the current demo, in seconds

demoname.description: returns the name of the current demo, minus extension

demoplayback.description: returns whether or not the client is current watching a demo

demotime.description: current demo playback time in seconds (float). Intended for scripted and timed camera movement.

droploc.description: returns the name of the location where the last backpack was dropped by the current player.

droptime.description: returns the number of seconds since the last backpack was dropped by the current player.

gamedir.description:
returns the current gamedir, which is often set when a server is running a mod.
e.g: 'fortress' for Team Fortress mods

lastpowerup.description: powerups last seen on the enemy within the past 5 seconds (e.g. "quad pent"); falls back to the value of tp_name_quad when no recent sighting.

matchname.description: current match name, derived from the active match-format template (e.g. "duel/playerA_vs_playerB - [dm6]"). Returns "No match in progress" when not connected.

matchstatus.description: current match state: one of "disconnected", "standby", or "normal".

matchtype.description: current match type keyword: one of duel, ffa, 2on2, 3on3, 4on4, tdm, arena, tfduel, tfclanwar, solo, coop, race, empty, unknown. Returns "No match in progress" when not connected.

nails.description: returns number of nails held, regardless of weapon selected

powerups.description: separator-delimited list of powerups currently held (quad, pent, ring, flag for CTF/TF); returns tp_name_none when none held.

qt.description: returns " - useful to clear cvars in scripts

rockets.description: returns number of rockets held, regardless of weapon selected

serverip.description: current server IP address and port, in ip:port form.

shells.description: returns number of shells held, regardless of weapon selected

time.description: returns the local time in the format <hours>:<minutes>

timestamp.description: current local date and time as a compact filesystem-safe string: YYYYMMDD-HHMM.

tp_powerups.description: $colored_powerups or $colored_short_powerups, depending on value of tp_poweruptextstyle
